exploration_notes: 1. **Error source files**: The assertion 'Do not know how to expand the result of this operator!' (the actual error matching the described crash) appears in two files in `llvm/lib/CodeGen/SelectionDAG/`: `LegalizeIntegerTypes.cpp` (line 3039, in `DAGTypeLegalizer::ExpandIntegerResult`) and `LegalizeFloatTypes.cpp` (line 1582, in `DAGTypeLegalizer::ExpandFloatResult`). Additionally, `LegalizeDAG.cpp` contains `SelectionDAGLegalize::ExpandNode` (line 3218) which handles operation-level expansion a
